title: Audrey Bergner Resting on a Sailboat Under Glinting Sunbeams in Buenos Aires City Argentina
description: Buenos Aires, Buenos Aires Province: Audrey Bergner finds a moment of serene connection with the shimmering expanse of the Río de la Plata while lounging on the deck of a sailboat. The mid-afternoon sun catches the gentle undulations of the water, casting a brilliant, fragmented luminosity across the scene that emphasizes the vast, open nature of this historic estuary. A white sail billows softly overhead, framing the subject and providing a clean, minimalist backdrop against the hazy horizon where distant vessels suggest the active maritime life of the capital. The composition balances the quiet composure of the explorer with the rhythmic, ever-changing textures of the river, captured with a sharp focus that highlights the technical precision of the camera held in her lap. Dressed for a breezy day on the water, she maintains a tranquil posture that contrasts with the sparkling chaos of the sun-drenched waves. This image serves as a poignant reminder of how the geography of Argentina’s coastline dictates the rhythm of urban relaxation, offering a unique perspective on the intersection of metropolitan life and nautical exploration. The photograph serves as an essential record of the local leisure culture that defines the riverfront experience in this bustling South American hub. This image is a collaborative production by Samuel Jeffery and Audrey Bergner for Project 23.
